positions.thesis: Sole ERT for MPS IIIB (Sanfilippo B), BLA filing guided Q4-26. Bottom-up rNPV/DCF below current price; upside case depends on peer-multiple re-rating or BioMarin buyout.
positions.questions: Confirm diagnosed patient count via KOL; confirm exact BioMarin royalty rate; watch confirmatory-trial power given modest effect size.

positions.thesis: Rademikibart (anti-IL-4Rα mAb) repositioned for acute exacerbations of asthma/COPD, a niche with no approved biologic competitor. SEABREEZE STAT Asthma Ph2 topline due early Sept 2026 is the binary event this whole model hinges on; rNPV Low/Base/High shown as the range (pending recalc against a revised loss-of-exclusivity assumption). Ownership is highly concentrated (top 7 holders ~72%, led by director-controlled Panacea Venture at 21.2%); note a confirmed sell-side conflict (Cantor Fitzgerald, $4 target, was a placement agent on the March 2026 raise).
positions.questions: Q2 2026 10-Q (due ~Aug-12) for runway trend check; recalculate valuation model against the revised loss-of-exclusivity assumption (2037/2040/2045, sourced from 10-K patent data, not yet flowed through since this environment has no Excel/LibreOffice recalc); verify RADIANT-AD China Ph3 AD data once a peer-reviewed publication or NMPA decision lands; current DEF 14A/proxy for exec comp and full board bios including new director James Schoeneck.
